basic_details.job_title: GPSC GWSSB AE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 205 Assistant Engineer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Engineer (Civil), Class-2 (GWSSB) | Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-2 (GWSSB)
basic_details.department: Gujarat Water Supply and Sewerage Board (GWSSB), Govt. of Gujarat
basic_details.short_information: GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Gujarat Public Service Commission (GPSC) recruitment notification 2026 for 205 Assistant Engineer (Civil & Mechanical), Class-2 vacancies under the Gujarat Water Supply and Sewerage Board (GWSSB). The online application process starts on 5th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 19th May 2026. The tentative date for the Preliminary Examination is 26th July 2026. Find GPSC GWSSB vacancies on the official OJAS website gpsc-ojas.gujarat.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitm

important_dates.age calculated as on: Last date of receipt of application (19/05/2026)

application_fee.details: Application fee details are as per Gujarat Government / GPSC OJAS norms. Candidates are advised to check the official OJAS portal for the exact fee applicable to their category before submitting the online application. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Candidates must have completed a minimum of 20 years and must not have completed 35 years of age as on the last date of receipt of application (19/05/2026). Age relaxation is provided to Female (Unreserved), Ex-Servicemen, and Physically Disabled candidates as per Gujarat Government norms.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of receipt of application (19/05/2026). Educational qualifications must be from recognized Universities/Institutes as per the detailed advertisement. No prior work experience is required for these posts. | Educational Qualification

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 44,900 – Rs. 1,42,400/- [Level-8] in the GWSSB Service

selection_process: Paper Subject Type Questions Marks Duration
Part-A General Studies Objective MCQ 100 100 3 Hours (180 Minutes)
Part-B Concerned Subject (Civil Engineering / Mechanical Engineering) Objective MCQ 200 200
Final Merit 50% Weightage of Prelim Exam Marks + 50% Weightage of Interview Marks
Result Declaration Within 10 working days from the last date of Interview
The selection process for GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 consists of 2 successive stages - a Preliminary Examination (Objective type

3 hours) and an Interview (100 marks). There is no Main Examination. The final merit list will be prepared with 50% weightage to Prelim Exam marks and 50% weightage to Interview marks. The result will be declared within 10 working days from the last date of interview.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the GPSC OJAS portal at gpsc-ojas.gujarat.gov.in. No offline or hard copy applications will be accepted. The online portal is active from 05/05/2026 to 19/05/2026. Candidates must apply separately for Civil and Mechanical posts if they wish to apply for both.
Visit the official OJAS portal: gpsc-ojas.gujarat.gov.in
Click on the link for "AE (Civil), Class-2 (GWSSB)" or "AE (Mechanical), Class-2 (GWSSB)" under "Current Advertisement"
Register with basic details (name, mobile number, email ID) - login credentials will be sent to registered mobile/email
Log in and fill the online application form with personal, educational, and category details
Upload scanned photograph and signature as per the specified guidelines
Pay the application fee online as applicable for your category
Review all details carefully before final submission
Download and take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference
important_instructions: Candidates must apply separately for Civil and Mechanical posts - a single application will not cover both disciplines. No prior work experience is required for either post. Only online applications will be accepted - no offline/hard copy applications will be entertained. Age will be calculated on the last date of receipt of application (19/05/2026). Female candidates of Unreserved category are eligible for 5 years age relaxation. Educational qualifications must be as per the detailed advertisement published on the GPSC website. There is no Main Examination - selection is based on Prelim Exam + Interview only. Final merit will be based on 50% Prelim + 50% Interview marks. All correspondence and communication should be addressed to the Secretary, Gujarat Public Service Commission only. Candidates are advised to regularly visit gpsc.gujarat.gov.in and gpsc-ojas.gujarat.gov.in for all recruitment updates. All decisions of the Gujarat Public Service Commission regarding eligibility, selection, and other matters are final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 is a state‑level recruitment conducted by Gujarat Public Service Commission for Assistant Engineer (Civil and Mechanical), Class‑2 posts under the Gujarat Water Supply and Sewerage Board. The selection is done through a Preliminary Examination followed by an Interview as per GPSC rules.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are expected in GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 notification is expected to announce around 200+ vacancies for AE (Civil) and AE (Mechanical) posts combined, with detailed category‑wise breakup for General, SC, ST, SEBC and EWS candidates in the official advertisement. Candidates should check the GPSC/OJAS notification for the exact vacancy numbers.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for GPSC GWSSB AE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application dates for GPSC GWSSB AE Recruitment 2026 are scheduled between early and mid‑May 2026, with the Preliminary Examination tentatively planned around July 2026 as per the GPSC exam calendar. Exact dates for the prelim, interview and final result will be notified in the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: To be eligible for GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer 2026, candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering or Mechanical Engineering (as applicable) from a recognized university, and meet the age and other conditions specified by GPSC. No prior work experience is generally required for AE Class‑2 posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026, the minimum age is usually 20 years and the maximum age is around 35 years for unreserved male candidates on the last date of application. Relaxations in upper age limit are provided to female candidates, reserved categories, ex‑servicemen and physically disabled candidates as per Gujarat Government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for GPSC GWSSB AE 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for GPSC GWSSB AE 2026 consists of a 300‑mark Preliminary Examination (Objective type) followed by a 100‑mark Interview. Final selection is normally based on a merit list prepared using 50% weightage from Prelim marks and 50% weightage from Interview marks.

faq.question: Q7. What is the exam pattern for the GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Preliminary Exam?
faq.answer: The GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Preliminary Exam generally carries 300 marks with objective questions divided into 100 marks for General Studies and 200 marks for the respective engineering subject (Civil or Mechanical). The duration of the paper is usually 3 hours and the exam is conducted in offline OMR mode.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer (Civil/Mechanical), Class‑2?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer (Civil/Mechanical), Class‑2 are placed in the pay scale of Rs. 44,900 – 1,42,400 (Level‑8) as per the 7th CPC, along with admissible allowances under Gujarat Government rules. The post is classified as Class‑2 (Other) in the GWSSB service.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: To apply online for GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026, candidates must visit the OJAS portal at gpsc‑ojas.gujarat.gov.in, select the relevant AE (Civil/Mechanical) advertisement, complete registration, fill the online application form, upload photo and signature, pay the required fee and submit the form before the last date. A printout of the submitted form should be kept for future reference.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 notification PDF?
faq.answer: The GPSC GWSSB Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 notification PDF can be downloaded from the official GPSC website under the “Advertisements” section and from the OJAS portal under “Current Advertisement”. Separate PDFs are provided for AE (Civil) and AE (Mechanical) with advertisement numbers mentioned in the GPSC notification list.
